## Checks

- [ ] I ran `uv run python -m pytest tests -q` or the equivalent targeted tests.
- [ ] I ran `uv run ruff check .`.
- [ ] I updated README or `/documentation` when public behavior changed.
- [ ] This change does not add target-specific bypass behavior or instructions.
- [ ] This change does not include real credentials, proxy details, session cookies, or sensitive screenshots.
